markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Oluwatimilehin to the Diligent content refresh process.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Workflow:** Use a Claude-based pipeline for refreshes, as Atlas is ineffective for this task. The goal is a \~30-minute turnaround per article.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=2641.0)
  - [**Product Positioning:** Diligent's strategy is thought leadership first. Product mentions are strictly limited to a single "How Diligent Helps" section before the conclusion.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
  - [**Tasking:** Oluwatimilehin will refresh two articles by EOD Thursday. Ademilade will complete the remaining three to meet the 5-article weekly quota.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
  - [**Quality Standard:** All new content must match the quality of recent articles on the `publish.diligence.com` blog, which serves as the benchmark for structure and tone.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Product Positioning

  - [**Audience Segmentation:** Articles can target multiple segments (SMB, Enterprise) via:](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
      - [Contextual examples within the text.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
      - [Dedicated subheaders (H3s) for specific segments.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
      - [Use Claude to identify an article's primary audience.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [**Product Positioning:**](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
      - [**Rule:** Product mentions are confined to a single "How Diligent Helps" section before the conclusion.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
      - [**Exception:** Internal links to product pages are allowed within the body, but the Diligent brand name must not be mentioned.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=1930.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This strategy prioritizes thought leadership, building trust before introducing solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)

### Workflow & Tools

  - [**Airtable:** The source of truth for all content tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
      - [**`Approved to Start` View:** Backlog of \~50 articles (10 weeks).](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
      - [**`In Production` View:** Articles assigned for the current week.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
      - [**Process:** Move a completed article to `Review Internally` and notify Ademilade.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
  - [**Claude:** The primary tool for refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=2641.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Atlas is ineffective for refreshes; Claude's agentic capabilities are required.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=2641.0)
      - [**Pipeline:** Ademilade is building a new Claude pipeline to generate net-new articles, which will be manually integrated into refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
  - [**Infographics:** A new, automated pipeline is available.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
      - [**Types:** Quote, Definition, Checklist, Process View, Hub & Spoke.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
      - [**Status:** Awaiting client approval. Use with a note for Ademilade.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)

### Refresh Process: Step-by-Step

  - [**1. Setup:**](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=2882.0)
      - [Create a new Google Doc for the refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=2913.0)
      - [Paste the original article's URL at the top for reference.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=2913.0)
  - [**2. Research & Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=3420.0)
      - [**Claude (Audience Analysis):** In a new chat, paste the article and prompt Claude to identify the target audience, pain points, and concepts.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=3460.0)
      - [**Perplexity (SEO Analysis):** Use the refresh prompt to get an SEO-focused analysis and research suggestions.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=3540.0)
  - [**3. Generate Draft:**](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=3579.0)
      - [**Claude (Main Draft):** In a new chat, use the refresh prompt, feeding it:](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=3579.0)
          - [The original article.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=3844.0)
          - [The audience analysis from step 2.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=3699.0)
          - [The SEO analysis from step 2.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=3844.0)
          - [Links to 2-3 relevant Diligent internal reports (e.g., GC Risk Index).](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=3875.0)
      - [**Note:** This process takes 5-10 minutes per article. Run prompts for multiple articles concurrently to maximize efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=4145.0)
  - [**4. Post-Processing & Editing:**](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=4586.0)
      - [**Editorial Judgment:** The Claude output is a starting point. Edit heavily to match Diligent's tone, remove jargon, and ensure conciseness.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=3809.0)
      - [**Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
          - [**Intro:** Must include a "This guide covers..." bulleted list.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
          - [**"What is..." Section:** Add an H2/H3 definition section after the intro if missing.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
          - [**"How Diligent Helps":** Create this dedicated section before the conclusion.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
          - [**FAQs:** Add 4-5 questions. The heading must be "FAQs about \[Topic\]."](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
          - [**Conclusion:** Ensure a transition paragraph and a clear CTA.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
      - [**CTAs:**](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=2265.0)
          - [**Mid-Text:** Add 1-2 CTAs linking to product pages or Diligent Institute reports.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=2317.0)
          - [**End-of-Article:** Add a second CTA after the FAQs. Use different phrasing (e.g., "Schedule a demo" vs. "Book a call").](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=2265.0)
      - [**Internal Linking:**](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=5035.0)
          - [Add 6-7 internal links per \~2,000 words.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=5209.0)
          - [**Rules:**](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=5201.0)
              - [Do not link to the primary keyword.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=5101.0)
              - [Use articles published in 2023 or later.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=5201.0)
              - [No competitor links.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=5272.0)
              - [No link spamming.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=5224.0)
      - [**Formatting:**](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
          - [**Links:** Update any old `insights.diligence.com` links to the new `resources.diligence.com` blog.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
          - [**Images:** Add alt text to all images.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=2612.0)
          - [**Style:** No Oxford commas; follow specific M-dash rules.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Oluwatimilehin:**](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
      - [Refresh the first two assigned articles by EOD Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
      - [Submit the completed Google Docs to the shared drive.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [**Ademilade:**](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
      - [Complete the remaining three articles for the week.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=1358.0)
      - [Review Oluwatimilehin's work and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
      - [Finalize and share the new Claude pipeline for net-new content.](https://fathom.video/share/AeboNkYGyTvsX1shcLzVtdxD7-tn59t7?tab=summary&timestamp=5287.0)
